list.name: provider
list.label: Provider
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT provider FROM inference_logs ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(request_at, $__interval), provider, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95 FROM inference_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(request_at) AND status = 'success' AND provider IN ($provider) GROUP BY 1, provider ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(request_at, $__interval), provider, percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p99 FROM inference_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(request_at) AND status = 'success' AND provider IN ($provider) GROUP BY 1, provider ORDER BY 1
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(request_at, $__interval), provider, count(*) AS calls FROM inference_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(request_at) AND provider IN ($provider) GROUP BY 1, provider ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(request_at, $__interval), provider, sum(coalesce(prompt_tokens, 0) + coalesce(completion_tokens, 0)) AS tokens FROM inference_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(request_at) AND provider IN ($provider) GROUP BY 1, provider ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(request_at, $__interval), provider, count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'error') AS errors FROM inference_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(request_at) AND provider IN ($provider) GROUP BY 1, provider ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(request_at, $__interval), provider, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY first_token_ms) AS p95_first_token FROM inference_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(request_at) AND first_token_ms IS NOT NULL AND provider IN ($provider) GROUP BY 1, provider ORDER BY 1
